claim: Agent-S uses experience-augmented hierarchical planning: combines web knowledge (via search) with internal episodic and narrative memory to break tasks into subtasks
actionable: When building GUI agents, separate task planning into narrative memory (high-level steps) and episodic memory (low-level actions like button clicks)
source_title: Agent-S: Unleash The Power Of GUI Computer Use Agents

claim: The agent computer interface (ACI) uses visual input (screenshot), accessibility tree (UI structure with unique IDs), and OCR to create a bounded action space
actionable: Build GUI agents with accessibility trees and OCR for reliable UI interaction; bound the action space to concrete, verifiable actions
source_title: Agent-S: Unleash The Power Of GUI Computer Use Agents

claim: GUI agents learn by storing self-generated summaries of successful task and subtask executions in memory, similar to the Voyager paper approach
actionable: Implement self-evaluation and memory storage for agent actions; continuously update memory with successful patterns for reuse
source_title: Agent-S: Unleash The Power Of GUI Computer Use Agents
